---
title: "The Rev. John William Fletcher"
---

## The Rev. John William Fletcher

**Dates:** (1729-1789)

### Description

Vicar of Madeley, Shropshire

### Letters

- Letter from March 7th 1894
- Letter from March 1st 1894
- Letter from Feb 24 [1894]
- Letter from Feb 19  [1894]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
